title: High Speed Steel Drill Bits 1/16 Inch Shank 10pc 50
description:
The 10pc #50 Drill Bits Set is a great addition to any home improvement tool collection. These drills are constructed of high speed steel and have a shank size of 1/16 inch. Each set comes with 10 #50 drill bits inside of a small plastic case for easy storage while not in use. Make sure to grab some of these before your next project, or gift them to your favorite hobbyist!
